```{r}
#| include: false
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(lubridate)
library(hms)
library(purrr)
library(epoxy)
library(poddr)

library(ggplot2)
library(scales)
library(ggrepel)
library(ggbeeswarm)
library(DT)
library(reactable)

# Fonts + themes — registers Besley/Roboto/Montserrat/Inter/JetBrains Mono
# via sysfonts on first call. Idempotent across pages.
register_site_fonts()

# Use showtext when rendering figures so registered Google Fonts get embedded.
knitr::opts_chunk$set(fig.showtext = TRUE)

# Dummy so uvr scan keeps these as imports — used by knitr/quarto internals.
if (FALSE) {
  library(ragg)
  library(Hmisc)
}
```
